heading: Definitions
label: 3051 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title XII of div. FF of , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 116–260

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. FF, title XII, § 1201134 Stat. 3252Dec. 27, 2020“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Horseracing Integrity and Safety Act of 2020’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. FF, title XII, § 1201134 Stat. 3252Dec. 27, 2020“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Horseracing Integrity and Safety Act of 2020’.”

children.heading: Authority
children.label: 1 Authority
children.text: The term “Authority” means the Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority designated by .section 3052(a) of this title

children.heading: Breeder
children.label: 2 Breeder
children.text: The term “breeder” means a person who is in the business of breeding covered horses.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 3 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Trade Commission.

children.label: A
children.text: beginning on the date of the horse’s first timed and reported workout at a racetrack that participates in covered horseraces or at a training facility; and

children.label: B
children.text: ending on the date on which the Authority receives written notice that the horse has been retired.

children.heading: Covered horserace
children.label: 5 Covered horserace
children.text: The term “covered horserace” means any horserace involving covered horses that has a substantial relation to interstate commerce, including any Thoroughbred horserace that is the subject of interstate off-track or advance deposit wagers.

children.heading: Covered persons
children.label: 6 Covered persons
children.text: The term “covered persons” means all trainers, owners, breeders, jockeys, racetracks, veterinarians, persons (legal and natural) licensed by a State racing commission and the agents, assigns, and employees of such persons and other horse support personnel who are engaged in the care, training, or racing of covered horses.

children.heading: Equine constituencies
children.label: 7 Equine constituencies
children.text: The term “equine constituencies” means, collectively, owners, breeders, trainers, racetracks, veterinarians, State racing commissions, and jockeys who are engaged in the care, training, or racing of covered horses.

children.heading: Equine industry representative
children.label: 8 Equine industry representative
children.text: The term “equine industry representative” means an organization regularly and significantly engaged in the equine industry, including organizations that represent the interests of, and whose membership consists of, owners, breeders, trainers, racetracks, veterinarians, State racing commissions, and jockeys.

children.heading: Horseracing anti-doping and medication control program
children.label: 9 Horseracing anti-doping and medication control program
children.text: The term “horseracing anti-doping and medication control program” means the anti-doping and medication program established under .section 3055(a) of this title

children.heading: Immediate family member
children.label: 10 Immediate family member
children.text: The term “immediate family member” shall include a spouse, domestic partner, mother, father, aunt, uncle, sibling, or child.

children.heading: Interstate off-track wager
children.label: 11 Interstate off-track wager
children.text: The term “interstate off-track wager” has the meaning given such term in .section 3002 of this title

children.heading: Jockey
children.label: 12 Jockey
children.text: The term “jockey” means a rider or driver of a covered horse in covered horseraces.

children.heading: Owner
children.label: 13 Owner
children.text: The term “owner” means a person who holds an ownership interest in one or more covered horses.

children.heading: Program effective date
children.label: 14 Program effective date
children.text: The term “program effective date” means .July 1, 2022

children.heading: Racetrack
children.label: 15 Racetrack
children.text: The term “racetrack” means an organization licensed by a State racing commission to conduct covered horseraces.

children.heading: Racetrack safety program
children.label: 16 Racetrack safety program
children.text: The term “racetrack safety program” means the program established under .section 3056(a) of this title

children.heading: Stakes race
children.label: 17 Stakes race
children.text: The term “stakes race” means any race so designated by the racetrack at which such race is run, including, without limitation, the races comprising the Breeders’ Cup World Championships and the races designated as graded stakes by the American Graded Stakes Committee of the Thoroughbred Owners and Breeders Association.

children.heading: State racing commission
children.label: 18 State racing commission
children.text: The term “State racing commission” means an entity designated by State law or regulation that has jurisdiction over the conduct of horseracing within the applicable State.

children.heading: Trainer
children.label: 19 Trainer
children.text: The term “trainer” means an individual engaged in the training of covered horses.

children.heading: Training facility
children.label: 20 Training facility
children.text: The term “training facility” means a location that is not a racetrack licensed by a State racing commission that operates primarily to house covered horses and conduct official timed workouts.

children.heading: Veterinarian
children.label: 21 Veterinarian
children.text: The term “veterinarian” means a licensed veterinarian who provides veterinary services to covered horses.

children.heading: Workout
children.label: 22 Workout
children.text: The term “workout” means a timed running of a horse over a predetermined distance not associated with a race or its first qualifying race, if such race is made subject to this chapter by election under section 3054(k) of this title of the horse’s breed governing organization or the applicable State racing commission.1
